# MAST Skills Test Results

## Internal Validation (Static Audit)

**Date**: 2026-04-15
**Method**: Automated keyword-based audit of generated config files against all 14 MAST failure modes

### MAST-Hardened Configs (generated by agent-workspace-interview)

| Mode | Name | Prevalence | Score | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FM-1.1 | Disobey task specification | 11.8% | DEFENDED | acceptance criteria, FM-1.1 |
| FM-1.2 | Disobey role specification | 1.5% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-1.3 | Step repetition | 15.7% | DEFENDED | before repeating, anti-loop |
| FM-1.4 | Loss of conversation history | 2.8% | DEFENDED | session checkpoint, summarize current state |
| FM-1.5 | Unaware of termination conditions | 12.4% | DEFENDED | task is complete only, Do NOT signal completion |
| FM-2.1 | Conversation reset | 2.2% | DEFENDED | FM-2.1 (never restart rule) |
| FM-2.2 | Fail to ask clarification | 6.8% | DEFENDED | ask for clarification, FM-2.2 |
| FM-2.3 | Task derailment | 7.4% | DEFENDED | drift, restate original objective |
| FM-2.4 | Information withholding | 0.85% | DEFENDED | share relevant findings, FM-2.4 |
| FM-2.5 | Ignored other agent's input | 1.9% | DEFENDED | peer input, FM-2.5 |
| FM-2.6 | Reasoning-action mismatch | 13.2% | DEFENDED | alignment check, reasoning says x but |
| FM-3.1 | Premature termination | 6.2% | DEFENDED | end task prematurely, FM-3.1 |
| FM-3.2 | No or incomplete verification | 8.2% | DEFENDED | verification protocol, verification has been performed |
| FM-3.3 | Incorrect verification | 9.1% | DEFENDED | high-level objective, high-level objectives checked |

**Coverage**: 13/14 (93%) DEFENDED, 98.5% prevalence covered

**Gap**: FM-1.2 Disobey role specification (1.5% prevalence) -- needs "you are X, not Y" pattern added to personality section

### No-MAST Baseline (original OpenClaw-style templates)

| Mode | Name | Prevalence | Score | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FM-1.1 | Disobey task specification | 11.8% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-1.2 | Disobey role specification | 1.5% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-1.3 | Step repetition | 15.7% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-1.4 | Loss of conversation history | 2.8% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-1.5 | Unaware of termination conditions | 12.4% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-2.1 | Conversation reset | 2.2% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-2.2 | Fail to ask clarification | 6.8% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-2.3 | Task derailment | 7.4% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-2.4 | Information withholding | 0.85% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-2.5 | Ignored other agent's input | 1.9% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-2.6 | Reasoning-action mismatch | 13.2% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-3.1 | Premature termination | 6.2% | UNDEFENDED | -- |
| FM-3.2 | No or incomplete verification | 8.2% | PARTIAL | vague "verify" instruction |
| FM-3.3 | Incorrect verification | 9.1% | PARTIAL | vague "verify" instruction |

**Coverage**: 0/14 (0%) DEFENDED, 0.0% prevalence covered (8.6% with partial credit)

### Improvement: MAST-Hardened vs Baseline
- +13 modes defended
- +98.5% prevalence coverage

## Dynamic Testing (Pending)

### Failure Injection Tests
- **Harness**: tests/test_harness.py
- **Status**: Ready to run (requires OpenAI or Anthropic API key)
- **Method**: 14 test prompts that deliberately trigger each failure mode, with LLM-as-judge evaluation
- **Expected outcome**: MAST-hardened configs pass significantly more tests than baseline

### ChatDev Paper Reproduction
- **Setup**: tests/chatdev-setup/
- **Status**: ChatDev cloned, venv installed, MAST-hardened YAML and scripts created
- **Method**: Run HumanEval with baseline prompts and MAST-hardened prompts, compare pass rates
- **Expected outcome**: MAST-hardened prompts yield >=9.4% improvement (paper baseline)
